---
id: register-family-api
title: "Register a new family"
description: "Creates a new family and its members via public self-registration. Requires public registration to be enabled in system settings."
sidebar_label: "Register a new family"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/public/churchcrm-public-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Register a new family"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/public/register/family"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new family and its members via public self-registration. Requires public registration to be enabled in system settings.

  id={"request"}
